\tzpentry{ID3709}{Holonomy Stress-Energy Tensor}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3709 introduces Holonomy Stress-Energy Tensor as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \oint_{\partial M} T^{\mu\nu} n_\nu \, d\Sigma_\mu = 0, \end{equation}
